inputs.label: Incident Photon Energy
inputs.businessContext: Energy of incoming photon before scattering

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy of incoming photon before scattering
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie des einfallenden Photons vor der Streuung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie du photon entrant avant diffusion
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía del fotón entrante antes de la dispersión

inputs.label: Incident Photon Wavelength
inputs.businessContext: Wavelength of incoming photon (if known); overrides energy when provided

label_i18n.es: Longitud de onda del fotón incidente

businessContext_i18n.en: Wavelength of incoming photon (if known); overrides energy when provided
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelen fotonun dalga boyu (biliniyorsa); sağlandığında enerjiyi geçersiz kılar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wellenlänge des eingehenden Photons (falls bekannt); überschreibt Energie, wenn angegeben
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'onde du photon entrant (si connue) ; remplace l'énergie lorsqu'elle est fournie
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de onda del fotón entrante (si se conoce); anula la energía cuando se proporciona

inputs.label: Scattering Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle between incident and scattered photon directions

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between incident and scattered photon directions
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelen ve saçılan foton yönleri arasındaki açı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen einfallender und gestreuter Photonenrichtung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre les directions du photon incident et diffusé
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo entre las direcciones del fotón incidente y dispersado

inputs.label: Electron Rest Energy
inputs.businessContext: Rest mass energy of the scattering particle (electron: 511 keV)

businessContext_i18n.en: Rest mass energy of the scattering particle (electron: 511 keV)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saçılan parçacığın durgun kütle enerjisi (elektron: 511 keV).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie de masse au repos de la particule diffusante (électron : 511 keV)
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía de masa en reposo de la partícula dispersora (electrón: 511 keV)
